anchorDocument(uint256,string,bytes32,st.notice: Anchor an IPFS CID to a specific application on-chain

documentCount(uint256).notice: Get total documents submitted for an application

getAppIdByCID(string).notice: Find which application a CID belongs to (reverse lookup)

getDocumentManifest(uint256).notice: Get all document records for an application

grantMultipleRoles(bytes32[],address).notice: Convenience: grant multiple roles to one account (admin only)

grantRole(bytes32,address).notice: Grant a role to an account (admin only)

hasRole(bytes32,address).notice: Check if an account has a specific role

renounceRole(bytes32).notice: An account can voluntarily renounce their own role

revokeRole(bytes32,address).notice: Revoke a role from an account (admin only)

verifyDocument(uint256,uint256,bytes32).notice: Verify a document's integrity by comparing hash to stored hash
